drivers.notes: Decoupled Carbon Dome in Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top

description.en: Compact three-way floorstander with the Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top, a Continuum-cone FST midrange and dual 130 mm Aerofoil bass drivers. The slim, rear-ported cabinet suits smaller listening rooms without sacrificing the 700 S3 family's tonal balance.
description.es: Floorstander compacto de tres vías con Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top, midrange Continuum FST y dos woofers Aerofoil de 130 mm. Su gabinete esbelto con puerto trasero se adapta a salas chicas sin perder el balance tonal de la línea 700 S3.
